problem: Why do all animals sleep — what is the essential biological function?
hypothesis: The key to Why do all animals sleep — what is the essential biological function? is Sleep-dependent memory consolidation in hippocampus — specifically Sleep-dependent memory consolidation — which would help 8,000,000,000 people affected.

experiment.protocol: fMRI connectivity study with 12 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
